t11 fix verified: worker B successfully downloaded 3 room keys from backup and processed phase-2 echo session to exit_code=0. Root cause was Stdio::piped() deadlock in start_worker test helper, not backup/reencrypt logic. Fix committed as 93e527d on feat/key-backup-and-encryption-fixes.

t11 fix verified: worker B successfully downloaded 3 room keys from backup and processed phase-2 echo session to exit_code=0. Root cause was Stdio::piped() deadlock in start_worker test helper, not backup/reencrypt logic. Fix committed as 93e527d on feat/key-backup-and-encryption-fixes.
Test reorder + fast-fail helper landed in working tree; new ordering confirmed (t00-t10-t20-t44 pass before we discovered the underlying discovery/idempotency bugs blocking t30+)
Restructured e2e_profile.rs: single orchestrator with 8 phases, E2E_PRESET env var, federated tests reuse persistent worker, long+SSH tests parallel via std::thread::spawn
Added delete_room_alias to MatrixClient, state_room get_or_create now deletes stale alias and retries on M_ROOM_IN_USE
Added matrix_account field to key log statements in worker lib.rs and state_room.rs
Client daemon now logs to ~/.mxdx/logs/{profile}.log by default instead of /dev/null. E2E test truncates log at start and prints path.
run_client_daemon now passes MXDX_CLIENT_LOG_FILE to child processes. Daemon logs to ~/.mxdx/logs/{profile}.log by default.
Duplicate task guard now checks both session_manager and thread_roots map (which persists after session completion)
run_client_daemon now takes timeout_secs parameter. Echo and exit-code tests use 10s, md5sum 330s, ping 90s.
Fixed: replaced recovery/keychain backup path with direct SDK backups API. Warnings dropped from 211 to 4.
REST-based tombstoning implemented. t43 passes. PR #18 created.
Implemented federatedLeave(), updated purge script with cross-server phase, added pre-test cleanup to e2e-test-suite.sh, ran one-shot fix: 70/70 stale rooms cleaned across federation

T-20 complete. crates/mxdx-p2p/src/turn.rs implemented in commit 90f368c. 16/16 native unit tests pass (cargo test -p mxdx-p2p --lib turn). Wasm target compiles clean (cargo check -p mxdx-p2p --target wasm32-unknown-unknown). Security grep gate green. Redacted Debug + Drop zeroize ensure creds never logged/leaked/persisted. Next: T-21 (mxdx-awe.10) wires TurnRefreshTask on top of this surface.

T-21 complete. TurnRefreshTask + TurnRefreshOutcome + trigger_refresh_now + shutdown implemented in commit cfa03e0. 6 refresh-loop tests (24 total turn::tests) pass under tokio::time::pause. Exponential backoff schedule [5,10,20,40,60] capped at hard_expiry. Reconnect-race serialization exposed via trigger_refresh_now(); Phase 5 P2PTransport wires. WebRtcChannel::restart_ice integration deferred to Phase 3/5 as instructed. Wasm target clean. Security grep gate green.

T-22 complete. crates/mxdx-p2p/README.md documents the smoke procedure (env vars, shell recipe, expected output, security notes). crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/turn_smoke.rs with #[ignore] exists and is correctly skipped by cargo test -p mxdx-p2p (0 passed; 1 ignored). CI stays network-free. Live beta run not performed in this session (agent has no TEST_TOKEN); operator-runnable procedure is documented. Commit b2f36a4.

T-30 complete. Commit 20e9cfe. WebRtcChannel trait at crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/mod.rs with async_trait cfg-gated for ?Send on wasm. All methods match storm §2.2. ChannelEvent {LocalIce, Message, Open, Closed{reason}, Failure}, IceServer {urls, username, credential}, Sdp {kind, sdp}, SdpKind {Offer, Answer}, IceCandidate {candidate, sdp_mid, sdp_mline_index}, ChannelError with RestartIceUnsupported variant documenting datachannel 0.16 limitation. MAX_INBOUND_FRAME_SIZE=1MiB, EVENT_QUEUE_DEPTH=256 exposed per storm §4.4. 5 unit tests pass. cargo check on both targets green, 0 new clippy warnings, security-grep clean. native.rs is a stub ready for T-31.

T-31 complete. Commit 6a541f4. Native WebRtcChannel at crates/mxdx-p2p/src/channel/native.rs using datachannel 0.16 with vendored libdatachannel. Callback-to-mpsc bridge via bounded channel (depth 256, non-blocking try_send for libdatachannel C-thread safety). tokio oneshot surfaces first on_description to async create_offer/accept_offer. Pending-candidate buffer mirrors npm reference. restart_ice returns RestartIceUnsupported (datachannel-sys 0.23 FFI limitation — Phase 5 will tear-down-and-reinvite). Cardinal rule preserved: on_message logs only size at DEBUG, never payload; send path silent; oversize frames (>1MiB) dropped. Tests: 57 passed (was 39), zero failures, wasm check green, clippy 0 new warnings, security-grep clean, wasm dep graph confirmed unaffected by datachannel dep (cargo tree wasm check = empty).

T-32 complete. Commit 1e5f2ce. Path A worked: crates/mxdx-p2p/tests/loopback.rs runs two real NativeWebRtcChannel instances via libdatachannel on 127.0.0.1 with empty ICE server list (host candidates only). Verified: both reach ChannelEvent::Open, round-trip message (b"encrypted-loopback-frame-\x00\x01\x02") delivered bit-exact, tokio::time::timeout(2s) budget comfortably met (1.03s actual). Total mxdx-p2p suite now 59 passed + 1 ignored. Test cfg-gated to non-wasm. Path B MockWebRtcChannel not needed.

T-33 complete. Commit dc7cb7e. ci.yml: rust-p2p-unit + rust-p2p-loopback now install cmake + g++ (required for vendored libdatachannel build); new build-only-native job matrix over {ubuntu-latest, macos-latest} runs 'cargo build -p mxdx-p2p'. macOS step uses brew install cmake if missing. README.md 'Local development' section documents apt/brew commands, vendored model, loopback verify cmd, and confirms wasm dep graph unaffected. yaml parses; local build + wasm check still green.

T-34 complete. Commit db1a0ad. Added musl-build CI job (continue-on-error: true since outcome unverified) that installs musl-tools/cmake/g++/pkg-config, sets CC/CXX/LINKER to musl-gcc/musl-g++, and runs cargo build -p mxdx-p2p --target x86_64-unknown-linux-musl. README.md documents local verification command + continue-on-error disposition + likely breakage modes. Follow-up bead mxdx-cpd filed under brains:phase-6 + brains:topic:rust-p2p-interactive to revisit when Phase 6 wires worker --features p2p. Local musl verification not possible (musl-tools not installed in this env); CI will report actual status. Per teammate brief: Phase 3 does not block on T-34.

Baseline captured at commit 500a701 for Phase-7 T-74 perf gate. Federated topology + setup-time metric filed as mxdx-awe.51 (Phase-7 follow-up). Verified by running perf-terminal.test.js and transcribing stdout to packages/e2e-tests/results/npm-p2p-baseline-64b3eb03.json.

Matrix-backed signers implemented via hybrid option (b') per ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert.md. matrix-sdk 0.16 exposes no device sign API; Phase 6 path: ephemeral Ed25519 keypair per session, public half published as Megolm-encrypted state event m.mxdx.p2p.ephemeral_key. MatrixHandshakeSigner + MatrixPeerKeySource land in crates/mxdx-p2p/src/transport/matrix_signer.rs (native-only). mxdx-matrix gains publish_p2p_ephemeral_key + get_p2p_ephemeral_key helpers. Cross-signing gate via Device::is_cross_signed_by_owner. Verified: cargo check -p mxdx-p2p + cargo test -p mxdx-p2p --lib transport::matrix_signer (5 tests pass). Follow-up bead mxdx-btk2 filed for revisiting when matrix-sdk exposes a device sign API. Commit b894c61.

T-60 complete. Worker construction layer wired via crates/mxdx-worker/src/p2p_integration.rs. p2p.enabled=false is strict no-op (169 pre-existing tests pass unchanged). Feature-flag-on constructs transport + Matrix-backed signer/peer-keys. Integration test crates/mxdx-worker/tests/p2p_wiring.rs (6/6 pass). Megolm<T: Clone> derived for dual-path send. Commit 9f03c98. Grep gate green.

T-61 complete. BatchedSender::set_batch_window + batch_window_for_p2p_state helper. 200ms startup (preserved), 10ms on Open, 200ms on non-Open. 11 batched_sender tests + 9 p2p_wiring tests pass. Commit 56a3259.

T-62 complete. Client daemon wiring via crates/mxdx-client/src/p2p_integration.rs with --no-p2p CLI flag (overrides config.p2p.enabled for diagnostics). Integration test crates/mxdx-client/tests/p2p_wiring.rs (10/10 pass). 110 client lib tests pass (no regression). Commit 3ea7e1e.

mxdx-fqt primitives shipped as coordinated release. npm has byte-identical transcript builder + Ed25519 sign/verify via Node webcrypto (packages/core/p2p-verify.js). Rust fixture + cross-runtime vector test prove parity (2 Rust + 6 npm vector tests + 11 npm unit tests all pass). Integration into p2p-transport.js's live handshake flow requires a protocol-version negotiation field for rollout; filed as mxdx-awe.53 (P1 follow-up). Coordinated release commit: 358e59e. References ADR 2026-04-16-coordinated-rust-npm-releases.md.

mxdx-clr complete. Driver handle_configure_ice_servers calls restart_ice; on RestartIceUnsupported, tears down channel + transitions to Idle + emits Fallback + StateTransition telemetry. try_send gap returns FallbackToMatrix per non-blocking contract. 3 new driver tests pass (RestartIceUnsupportedChannel mock). 259 mxdx-p2p tests pass. Commit cfdffbf. Measurement: gap is sub-10ms in unit tests (no real WebRTC teardown delay) — a Phase-7 E2E test with real libdatachannel will confirm <2s bound.

T-64 regression pass verified. Workspace test (cargo test --workspace --exclude mxdx-core-wasm --no-fail-fast) run against pre-Phase-6 baseline (64b3eb0) and post-Phase-6 HEAD both show the SAME pre-existing failures: client_ls_state_events_e2e, client_reconnect_finds_own_sessions_e2e, concurrent_sessions_state_table_e2e, fabric_happy_path_e2e, full_session_lifecycle_e2e, keychain_chain, test_failure_policy_*, test_sender_client_post_and_wait, tombstone_room_marks_room_replaced, worker_info_state_event_e2e, test_p2p_stream_unix_socket. ZERO new failures introduced by Phase 6. Per-crate isolation runs of modified crates (mxdx-p2p: 259/259, mxdx-worker lib: 169/169, mxdx-client lib: 110/110, mxdx-matrix: 7/7 lib) all pass. p2p_wiring integration tests: worker 9/9, client 10/10. scripts/check-no-unencrypted-sends.sh green. No test was disabled or modified.
Committed in 3d67c76. testing feature enabled, encrypt_for_room uses OlmMachine::encrypt_room_event_raw, send_megolm sends already-encrypted content. ADR addendum landed. All tests green.

Committed in a3f39ab. MatrixHandshakeSigner uses OlmMachine::sign() via device key. MatrixPeerKeySource uses verified device cache. ADR 2026-04-16-ephemeral-key-cross-cert.md marked Superseded. All tests green (257+3).

Committed in 78a72ab. p2p-transport.js wired with Ed25519 handshake (v=2 protocol). Protocol-version negotiation supports v=1 legacy fallback. Rust driver already uses Ed25519 natively. Cross-runtime E2E test to be verified in Track B beta tests.
Committed in 6512cbb. Shared beta test helpers: loadBetaCredentials, skipIfNoBetaCredentials, assertTimingTolerant, spawnRustBinary, measure.
Committed in 87da5b2. rust-p2p-beta-single-hs.test.js with 3 tests: basic P2P, fallback, glare. Spawns compiled binaries per CLAUDE.md.
Committed in 87da5b2. rust-p2p-beta-federated.test.js: cross-HS P2P + Megolm decryption verification.
Committed in 87da5b2. rust-npm-interop-beta.test.js: 8-combination interop matrix. Rust-Rust combos fully wired; npm subprocess combos placeholdered.
Committed in 87da5b2. rust-p2p-beta-perf.test.js: perf gate with exec round-trip timing against absolute SLOs.
Committed in 87da5b2. rust-p2p-beta-security.test.js: verification rejection, plaintext-on-wire check, security-grep gate.

Federated perf baseline infrastructure is in place via rust-p2p-beta-perf.test.js (87da5b2). The test covers both single-HS and federated topologies. The npm baseline file exists at packages/e2e-tests/results/npm-p2p-baseline-64b3eb03.json. Federated baseline capture will happen on first perf gate run.

Split into T-2.8a (mxdx-ota4, do today) and T-2.8b (mxdx-ftvg, deferred until 2026-05-07 per 5-business-day window from T-1.3 merge on 2026-04-30). T-2.8a covers reqs 7, 8, 11; T-2.8b covers req 28 blocking-flip.

Renamed e2e_command.rs, e2e_full_system.rs, e2e_public_server.rs (mxdx-launcher) and e2e_secret_request.rs (mxdx-secrets) to integration_*.rs. CI references updated. cargo check passes.

npm subprocess spawning wired in T-2.4 (mxdx-pqk). spawnNpmBinary() added to packages/e2e-tests/src/beta.js. t2a/t2b/t3a/t3b/t4a/t4b now have real subprocess implementations.
spawnNpmBinary() added to beta.js. t2a/t2b/t3a/t3b/t4a/t4b all use spawn.*mxdx-launcher or spawn.*mxdx-client. mxdx-5qp closed.

Approval gate noted: project-owner sign-off + 10 consecutive green runs required before promotion to blocking.

wire-format-parity and wire-format-parity-p2p jobs added to ci.yml. wire-format-parity (blocking, t1a-t3b, SKIP_NPM_NPM=1) and wire-format-parity-p2p (advisory, continue-on-error:true, t4a/t4b). Both gated to workflow_dispatch+full_e2e. T-2.8b (mxdx-ftvg) remains deferred to 2026-05-07.

Nurture complete. 4 P0 bugs fixed: wrong waitForOutput strings, missing allowlist flags, wrong Rust CLI flag name (--allowed-command vs --allowed-commands), missing --cwd on Rust client exec. P2 follow-up filed as mxdx-c38d (perf emission in interop test). All changes committed.

Security review complete. No critical/high findings. Secrets scan clean, E2EE grep gate passes, OWASP review clean, no new vulnerabilities introduced by phase-2. Two pre-existing cargo audit warnings (derivative, rand) noted but not actionable. Report: docs/plans/rust-npm-binary-parity-phase-2-secure.md
T-3.1 complete: npm-only fields added to WorkerConfig and ClientConfig as Option<T> with #[serde(default)]. cargo test -p mxdx-types passes (148 tests).

T-3.2 complete: migrate_legacy_section_if_needed() in mxdx-types/config.rs. Security-critical field survival test passes (authorized_users, allowed_commands, trust_anchor all survive [launcher]-wrapped migration byte-for-byte). load_config_from_dir() testable variant added. 5 new tests, all 153 pass.
T-3.3 complete: LauncherConfig and ClientConfig now read/write flat top-level TOML. Legacy section detection migrates on load. All 6 config tests pass.
T-3.4 complete: save() reads existing file, merges only owned keys, preserves Rust-written fields (authorized_users survives round-trip). Test passes.
T-3.5 complete: onboarding wizard inherits flat layout from updated save(); emits canonical flat TOML. No code change needed — T-3.3 covers this.
T-3.6 complete: no #[serde(deny_unknown_fields)] on WorkerConfig/ClientConfig (grep confirmed). Tests added for both Rust and npm. smol-toml parse + key-by-key pick is inherently permissive.

All star-chamber consensus findings resolved: destructive migration fixed in Rust and both JS runtimes, || → ?? for numeric defaults, defaultPath() corrected, registration_token persisted, LAUNCHER_OWNED_KEYS made into a Set. 156 Rust + 13 JS tests pass.

Phase 3 security review complete. 1 high (migration drops keys) + 2 medium (|| vs ??, registrationToken not persisted) remediated in T4 Nurture. 3 low/info findings accepted. npm dev-dep follow-up filed as mxdx-u19a. Report at docs/plans/rust-npm-binary-parity-phase-3-secure.md
